today.title: Today
today.mealsComingText: No plan yet. Generate this week and the app will suggest meals for your calorie targets.
today.placeholderSubtitle: Today's calories and meals will appear here.

planScreen.pastNotice: Past days can't be edited – you can only mark retroactively whether a meal was eaten.
planScreen.conflictAllergen: Contains {{allergen}}, which a profile is allergic to.
planScreen.conflictAvoided: A profile has this item marked as avoided.

library.placeholderSubtitle: Recipe and ingredient database with nutrition data.
library.noResults: Nothing found. Try adjusting your search or filters.

shopping.emptyList: The shopping list is empty for now.
shopping.emptyPantry: The pantry is empty for now.

progress.dietCycleBanner: You've lost a good amount of body fat since you started – consider switching to maintenance calories for 1–2 months before continuing the deficit.
progress.noDataText: Once you log your first weight entry, you'll see your trend here.
progress.tdeeInsufficientData: Not enough data yet for a trend-based estimate (log your weight and meals more consistently).

walkthrough.page1Title: One plan for the whole family
walkthrough.page1Body: Everyone gets their own portions and goals, built from a single shared meal plan, pantry and shopping list.
walkthrough.page2Body: We compute your daily calories and macros (TDCI) from your details – it recalculates instantly whenever anything changes.
walkthrough.page3Title: A full week, planned for you
walkthrough.page3Body: Generate a whole week of meals in one tap, respecting allergies, diets and how often you want a recipe to repeat.
walkthrough.page4Body: The shopping list is built from your plan automatically, and tracks what you already have at home.
walkthrough.page5Body: Log your weight and body composition over time and get nudged toward maintenance at the right moment.

wizard.compositionSubtitle: A household shares one meal plan, one pantry and one shopping list.
wizard.preferencesSubtitle: These apply to the whole household; each member can still add their own on top.
wizard.maxRepetitionsHint: How many times the same recipe may appear in one weekly meal plan.
wizard.profileSubtitle: Let's set up this profile — allergies and diet preferences are set per member.
wizard.doneSubtitle: Your household is ready. You can fine-tune anything later in Settings.
wizard.compositionMismatchMessage: You originally set {{adults}} adults and {{children}} children, but created {{actualAdults}} adults and {{actualChildren}} children. Continue anyway?

form.name: Name
form.bodyFat: Body fat (optional, recommended for a more precise calorie calculation)
form.sharesMainMealsHint: Turn off to give this member an independently generated plan.
form.wantsNewFoods: I want to try new foods
form.wantsNewFoodsHint: The app will gently favor recipes you haven't had recently when planning.
form.workoutDaysHint: On training days the app adds a bit more calories (as carbs); on rest days it trims them back so the weekly average matches your target.
form.goalWeightConflict: With a lower target body fat, the goal weight cannot exceed the current weight.
form.recompositionHint: Missing your current body fat % - without it the app can't detect recomposition (building muscle while losing fat) and will set a plain calorie surplus instead. Fill in your current body fat % above for a more accurate result.

activityQuestion.title: How is your lifestyle?
activityQuestion.hint: Exercise doesn't count here - this is just about everyday movement outside of training.

customTdee.label: Maintenance calories
customTdee.hint: The app skips the activity-based estimate and computes your deficit/surplus and macros straight from this number.

bodyFatChart.title: Body fat ranges
bodyFatChart.hint: Approximate ranges (ACE classification). For a more precise value, use calipers or a DEXA scan.

profile.manualAdjustmentHint: Manually nudge the computed calories up or down, in steps of 100 kcal.
profile.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}'s profile? You'll be able to undo this briefly.

navy.title: Body fat calculator
navy.subtitle: Navy tape method (body circumferences, ±3–4 % accuracy). A more precise DEXA or caliper value can be entered manually.

tdciMode.fatFloorViolated: Note: with the current protein target, there isn't enough left for the 20% fat floor - consider lowering the protein target or adjusting calories.

foodEdit.gramsPerCup: Weight per cup (optional, drives the recipe kitchen equivalent)
foodEdit.cameraPermissionNeeded: Scanning a barcode needs camera access.
foodEdit.productNotFoundMessage: This barcode wasn't found in the Open Food Facts database. You can fill in the details manually - the barcode will still be saved with this food.

foodDetail.deleteMessage: This food will be removed from the library.

recipeDetail.deleteMessage: This recipe will be removed from the library.
recipeDetail.ratingConflictMessage: One household member likes this recipe, another doesn't. How should meal planning handle it?

todayMeal.deleteMessage: It will be removed from this day's plan.
todayMeal.deleteOthersMessage: This recipe also appears {{count}} more time(s) later in the plan.

recipeImport.title: Import recipe from the web
recipeImport.errorNotFound: No recipe could be found on that page. Try a different address, or enter the recipe manually.
recipeImport.errorNetwork: The page could not be loaded. Check the address and your internet connection.
recipeImport.guideStep1: Open the recipe in your browser (e.g. on your favorite recipe site).
recipeImport.guideStep3: Paste it here and tap Load recipe.
recipeImport.partialNote: The page didn't contain complete recipe data – only the name and photo were loaded.

notifications.weighInBody: Don't forget to log your weight this morning.
notifications.planningBody: Generate next week's meal plan and top up the shopping list.
notifications.shoppingBody: Check the shopping list before you head out.

settings.title: Settings
settings.maxRepetitionsHint: Household default – an individual recipe can override this limit in its own settings.
settings.allowConsecutiveDaysHint: Useful for batch cooking – the same meal may repeat the very next day.
settings.coldDinnerFrequencyHint: How many dinners per week the app tries to make cold (recipes/foods marked "can be served cold"). 0 = off.
settings.slotsSumWarning: Enabled slots currently add up to {{sum}} %
settings.macroOverridesHint: Per-member overrides for protein, fat share and gain surplus. Leave blank to use the computed defaults.
settings.navigationHint: Drag to reorder. The first {{max}} items sit in the main bar, the rest in the expand panel.
settings.scrollMemoryHint: By default every screen resets to the top when you switch to it. Turn this on to restore your last scroll position instead, if you come back quickly.
settings.mealTimesHint: Shown when meal reminders are enabled.
settings.slotPortionsHint: Adjust how this profile splits their daily calorie target across slots. Leave unchanged to use the household default.
settings.deleteCustomUnitMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

tempo.title: How fast?
tempo.hintLose: A faster pace means a bigger calorie deficit - the app keeps it within a safe range.
tempo.hintGain: A faster pace means a bigger calorie surplus.

mealSlots.title: How many meals a day?
mealSlots.hint: Pick every meal you actually want - skip any of them, including main meals. "Shared" means you'll eat the same recipe as the rest of the household on that slot.

water.title: Track your water intake?
water.hint: The daily goal is computed automatically from weight; you can change it anytime in settings.

summary.title: Summary
summary.recompositionNote: Recomposition - calories at maintenance, not a deficit.
